content_type: candid photo of a printed sign
description: Color photograph of a printed TSA placard mounted in a black plastic stanchion frame at an airport checkpoint or queue area, with travelers' luggage (a gray rollaboard) and a seated passenger visible in the soft-focus background. The sign is a printed notice: in bold red ascending type it reads 'No threats. No verbal abuse. No physical violence of any kind.' Below in blue text: 'If you threaten, endanger, or harm Transportation Security Officers during screening, TSA will pursue criminal penalties and fines of up to $13,910. Thank you for your cooperation.' A small TSA seal sits at the lower left, and the lower right reads 'Stay Healthy. Stay Secure. tsa.gov/coronavirus'. The photograph captures a pre-existing physical sign.
notable_text: No threats. No verbal abuse. No physical violence of any kind.; TSA will pursue criminal penalties and fines of up to $13,910.; Stay Healthy. Stay Secure. tsa.gov/coronavirus
